title: Live latent previews for LTX (LTXAV) via taeltx TAE decoder + KJNodes preview override
description: LTX is the ONLY workflow with no live latent preview, which reads as 'nothing happening' next to every other model showing latents. Investigation (2 parallel agents + live tests, 2026-06-30): TAESD is NOT a slowdown contributor for LTX (red herring) — `--preview-method taesd` is set everywhere (routes/comfy.js:342, Pod wrapper.py:228) but no LTX-compatible decoder was installed, so the preview path produced NOTHING for LTX = zero overhead, and `get_previewer` runs ONCE per sampler not per-step so the failed lookup never cost anything. Real slowdown is unchanged: aimdo per-stage re-fault of the 40GB LTXAV transformer (~108-127s/fault, ~67% of gen — see docs/builder/research/pod-perf-investigation.md). ROOT of no-preview: LTXAV (audio+video) ships with both preview paths nulled (comfy/latent_formats.py:435-438 latent_rgb_factors=None, taesd_decoder_name=None inherited) because the in-loop latent x0 is PATCH-PACKED transformer tokens (live-probed shape (1,1,50048), plain Tensor, NOT a [B,128,F,H,W] grid; 50048 isn't a multiple of 128). The 128-ch LTXV latent2rgb matmul can't apply (live RuntimeError mat1 50048x1 vs mat2 128x3). Wiring core taesd_decoder_name='taeltx_2' + dropping Kijai's taeltx2_3.safetensors in vae_approx ALSO fails (live ValueError: not enough values to unpack expected 5 got 3) — core TAEHVPreviewerImpl feeds the raw packed 3D tensor, the TAE wants unpacked 5D. WORKING PATH (found, not yet wired): KJNodes `LTX2SamplingPreviewOverride` node (custom_nodes/comfyui-kjnodes/nodes/ltxv_nodes.py:921-950) installs an OUTER_SAMPLE wrapper that HAS shape/latent_shapes, unpacks correctly, feeds the taeltx VAE, and emits standard binary-WS PREVIEW_IMAGE frames the app already catches (comfyController.js:632-642 -> generation:preview -> MpiGalleryBlock). It auto-detects taeltx when the VAE class is TAEHV (line 946). It is is_experimental ('temporary measure until previews are in comfy core'). NOTE: video latent previews look coarse/garbage by design (same as Wan) — goal is the 'something is happening' reassurance signal, not pretty. SCOPE (user-confirmed): PROVE on ONE file first (LTX_t2v.json) — wire a VAELoader(taeltx_2) + LTX2SamplingPreviewOverride into the model->LTXVNormalizingSampler path, test live, confirm previews render AND the experimental override composes with our chunked LTXVNormalizingSampler (the one unverified risk). THEN decide rollout to the other stage-1 variants (LTX_i2v, +gguf) and whether stage-2 files need it. DEPENDENCY: taeltx_2.safetensors (Kijai taeltx2_3, 22.4MB, https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/taeltx2_3.safetensors) becomes a real LTX dependency — local download into models/vae_approx/ (or models/vae/ for VAELoader visibility, TBD) + Pod image bake — wire into the dependency system once proof passes. Node-naming law applies (new non-Tier-1 nodes -> Input_*/Output_* titles, sync last_node_id/link_id counters). BRANCH: RunPod. Relates: MPI-157 (LTX perf), MPI-162 (next up).
activeSessionTitle: MPI-166 — LTX live latent previews SHIPPED (KJNodes override built-in factors, zero added cost) + app-side VHS-header SOI fix; local-verified, Pod follow-up
outcome: SHIPPED + LOCAL-VERIFIED 2026-06-30 (t2v + i2v, preview paints in gallery card). TAESD ruled out as LTX slowdown (red herring — get_previewer runs ONCE/sampler, and no LTX decoder was even installed so zero overhead; real slowdown stays aimdo 40GB re-fault). No-preview ROOT: LTXAV ships both preview paths nulled because the in-loop latent is patch-packed tokens (1,1,50048), not a [B,128,F,H,W] grid — core matmul AND core taeltx path both fail live. FIX: KJNodes LTX2SamplingPreviewOverride node (after Model_Connect in template), which carries its OWN LTXAV rgb-factors = cheap matmul, NO taeltx dependency, ZERO added per-step cost (win-win). App couldn't show them because the node uses VideoHelperSuite's 28-byte binary header vs core's 8 — fixed app-side with _stripPreviewHeader() scanning for JPEG SOI (FF D8), both onmessage sites in comfyController.js. 8 workflows regenerated from template via orchestrate.py. taeltx_2.safetensors deleted (unused). FOLLOW-UP (not blocking): Pod/remote verify — proxy WS passes binary through so the SOI fix should cover remote, but unconfirmed on a live Pod. Detail in docs/gotchas.md § 'LTX live latent previews'.
